summary: Iteration 122: UI/UX cleanup verification for Culinary and Pastry modules. All visual changes verified - dark theme, gold accents (#c8a97e), no amber/orange states, decorative components stripped. Fixed one remaining amber color in Pastry App.tsx dynamic import error fallback.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Pastry App.tsx line 17 had amber color #b45309 in dynamic import error fallback button - updated to gold accent styling
VERIFIED: Culinary App.tsx LoadingFallback uses dark bg (#04060d) with gold spinner (#c8a97e)

VERIFIED: TronBackdrop.tsx returns just children (no decorative backdrop)
VERIFIED: Pastry App.tsx LoadingFallback uses dark bg (#04060d) with gold spinner (#c8a97e)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 122 verified UI/UX cleanup on Culinary and Pastry modules. Key changes: (1) Culinary header now shows 'Culinary Suite' with gold accent instead of 'Echo Recipe Pro'. (2) Loading spinners use dark bg (#04060d) with gold (#c8a97e) spinner. (3) Error boundaries use dark red (#3f0f0f) background. (4) TronBackdrop, CornerBrand, SubtleBottomGlow components now return null/children only. (5) Pastry sidebar uses gold accent for active items, mono font section headers, enterprise dark toggle styling. Fixed one amber color (#b45309) in Pastry dynamic import error fallback.
